zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Anthorne於1430年出生在英國可瓦爾費爾時，她的父親John Antronithe28歲，母親Margaret Bodrugan28歲。她於大約1450年與Valentine Pettit在英國英格蘭可瓦爾費爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年在英國可瓦爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Anthorne于1430年出生在英国可瓦爾費爾时，她的父亲John Antronithe28岁，母亲Margaret Bodrugan28岁。她于大约1450年与Valentine Pettit在英国英格兰可瓦爾費爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年在英国可瓦爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Anthorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Athorn
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Middle English atte horne ‘(dweller) at the spit of land’, Old English horn.
2 English: locative name from Middle English atte thorne ‘(dweller) at the thorn bush’ (Old English þorn).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Anthorne was born in 1430, in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, her father, John Antronithe, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Bodrugan, was 28. She married Valentine Pettit about 1450, in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1486, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Anthorne est née en 1430, à Philleigh, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Antronithe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bodrugan, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Valentine Pettit environ 1450, à Philleigh, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1486, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St. Allen, Cornwall, England: St Allen, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Anthorne 1430 in Philleigh, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Antronithe 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bodrugan 28. Sie hat um 1450 in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Valentine Pettit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1486 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in Cornwall, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Anthorneが1430年にイギリスコルンワルフィレイグで生まれた時，父John Antronitheは28歳，母Margaret Bodruganは28歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルフィレイグでValentine Pettitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年にイギリスコルンワルで56歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Anthorne(이)가 1430년 영국 코른월 필리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Antronithe(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bodrugan(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 필리에서 Valentine Pettit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 코른월에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Valentine Pettit aproximadamente 1450, em Philleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Anthorne родилась в 1430 г. в местности филлиг, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени John Antronithe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bodrugan, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Valentine Pettit около 1450 г. в местности филлиг, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1486 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности корнвалл, Англия.
